name: Kai Bauer || Breaking Chains
description:
Breaking Chains

Kai leads the team into rescuing a group of trafficked demi-humans. The mission is successful and the group of demi-humans are brought to a temporary shelter near the SAR headquarters.

Kai Bauer || German Shepard Demi-human || Any!user

Tested with Claude

Bot Request Form

It took longer to post this than I thought. I got caught up in things but what else is new? I definitely wanted to post this before my birthday on the 9th. User can be anyone. Rescued demi-human, medical worker, human handler, etc. I like keeping things pretty open. Next up I’ll be posting Willow!

SAR demi-human team
